List.Title: Consultations
List.Description: Tracks consultations provided to others, whether by email, meetings, or calls. This facilitates reporting on reach and impact.
List.Name: {46C5DE12-F5B3-4BB8-9FAD-E75C6B0190A9}

Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: (Optional) A quick one-line summary of how the member or customer engaged with us. If left empty, this field is auto-populated with the service type and recipients after saving. This field is only used for making search results more readable.
The attendees or recipients of this consultation. If the PI also attended, enter them here as well.
Field.Name: Recipient

Field.Description: The Primary Investigator or Co-Investigators of the study or project. Investigators do not need to be present at the time of service.
Field.Name: PI
Field.Title: Project PI or Contact

Field.Description: The date when either: a service was provided; a consultation meeting was held; email was received; or long-running activity started.
Field.Name: Date
Field.Title: Consultation Date

Field.Name: ServicesReceived
Field.Title: Services Received
Field.Description: (Required) The name of the consultation type provided to members or other stakeholders.

Field.CustomFormatter: {"$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/column-formatting.schema.json","elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if(@currentField, 'flex', 'none')","flex-direction":"column","align-items":"flex-start","justify-content":"flex-start","padding":"5px","padding-bottom":"0px","font-size":"12px","color":"#323130"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"flex","align-items":"center","gap":"4px"},"attributes":{"title":"=if(@currentField=='', '(not set)', toDateString(@currentField))"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"=if(Date(toDateString(@currentField))==Date(toDateString(@now)), 'DUE TODAY', if(floor((Date(toDateString(@currentField)) + 46800000) / 86400000) > floor((Date(toDateString(@now)) + 46800000) / 86400000), toString(floor((Date(toDateString(@currentField)) + 46800000) / 86400000 - floor((Date(toDateString(@now)) + 46800000) / 86400000))) + 'd', '-' + toString(floor((Date(toDateString(@now)) + 46800000) / 86400000 - (Date(toDateString(@currentField)) + 46800000) / 86400000)) + 'd'))","style":{"font-size":"10px","padding-right":"1px"},"attributes":{"class":"=if(Date(toDateString(@currentField))==Date(toDateString(@now)), 'ms-fontColor-orangeLight', if(Date(toDateString(@currentField))>Date(toDateString(@now)), 'ms-fontColor-themeSecondary', 'ms-fontColor-neutralTertiary'))"}},{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"=if(Date(toDateString(@currentField))==Date(toDateString(@now)), 'FavoriteStarFill', if(Date(toDateString(@currentField))>Date(toDateString(@now)), 'SortUp', 'SortDown'))","class":"=if(Date(toDateString(@currentField))==Date(toDateString(@now)), 'ms-fontColor-orangeLight', if(Date(toDateString(@currentField))>Date(toDateString(@now)), 'ms-fontColor-themeSecondary', 'ms-fontColor-neutralTertiary'))"},"style":{"font-size":"10px"}}]},{"elmType":"div","inlineEditField":"@currentField","style":{"display":"flex","align-items":"center","gap":"4px","margin-top":"2px","text-decoration":"=if(Date(toDateString(@currentField))>=Date(toDateString(@now)), 'none', 'line-through')"},"attributes":{"class":"=if(Date(toDateString(@currentField))==Date(toDateString(@now)), 'ms-fontColor-red', if(Date(toDateString(@currentField))>Date(toDateString(@now)), 'ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary', 'ms-fontColor-neutralTertiary'))","title":"=if(@currentField=='', '(not set)', toDateString(@currentField)) + ' (click to edit)'"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"=if(Date(toDateString(@currentField))==Date(toDateString(@now)), 'GotoToday', 'Calendar')"},"style":{"font-size":"12px","padding-right":"5px"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"=@currentField.displayValue","style":{"font-weight":"=if(Date(toDateString(@currentField))>=Date(toDateString(@now)), '500', '400')"}}]}]}
Field.Description: If a follow up is required, this date is a reminder of when to follow up. An email reminder will be sent to the corresponding team on this date.
Field.Name: FollowUpDate
Field.Title: Follow Up Deadline

Field.Description: Link to OneNote Notebook, Google Docs, etc.
Field.Name: Notebook

Field.Description: The fiscal year when this service was provided (7/1 - 6/30).
Field.Name: FiscalYear
Field.FormulaDisplayNames: =TEXT(IF(AND(MONTH([Consultation Date])>=1,MONTH([Consultation Date])<=6),YEAR([Consultation Date])-1,YEAR([Consultation Date])),"0000")&"-"&TEXT(IF(AND(MONTH([Consultation Date])>=7,MONTH([Consultation Date])<=12),YEAR([Consultation Date])+1,YEAR([Consultation Date])),"0000")

Field.Description: The year when this service was provided.
Field.Name: CalendarYear

Field.Description: Publications, code repositories, and news articles that were a direct or indirect result of this consultation. If the center or a specific core was credited, include that information here.
Field.Name: Publications
Field.Title: Publications

Field.Description: Grants or funding opportunities applied to or received as a direct or indirect result of this consultation.
Field.Name: ExternalGrants
Field.Title: External Grants

Field.Description: The research area focus for this event, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
Field.Name: ResearchAreas

Field.Description: The research methodology and applications focus for this event, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
Field.Name: ResearchMethodologies

Field.Description: The population focus for this event, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
Field.Name: Populations
TaxKeyword
Field.Description: Custom tags and keywords for searching.

Field.Name: Notes
Field.Title: Notes
Field.Description: Additional notes, comments, links, or important remarks.

Field.Name: Service_x0020_Type_x003a_hiddenP
Field.Description: The team who provided this service.
Field.CustomFormatter: {"$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/column-formatting.schema.json","elmType":"div","style":{"text-align":"center","vertical-align":"middle","display":"=if(@currentField=='','none','inheirt')","text-decoration":"none","cursor":"pointer"},"customRowAction":{"action":"embed","actionInput":{"src":"=@currentWeb + '/Lists/Teams%20List/ContactCards.aspx?env=WebViewList&FilterField1=Title&FilterType1=Computed&FilterOp1=In&FilterValue1=' + if(@currentField=='', '', if(toString(@currentField)=='[object Object]', @currentField.lookupValue, @currentField)","height":"500","width":"560"}},"children":[{"elmType":"div","style":{"text-align":"center","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none"},"attributes":{"href":"","target":"_blank","title":"=if(@currentField=='', ' (not set) ', 'Click to Open')","class":"ms-fontSize-18"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","attributes":{"iconName":"=if(@currentField=='', 'none', 'TeamWork')"},"style":{"text-align":"center","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none","padding-left":"2px","padding-right":"3px","class":"ms-fontSize-18"}},{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"=if(@currentField=='', '', if(toString(@currentField)=='[object Object]', @currentField.lookupValue, @currentField))","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontSize-12"},"style":{"padding-left":"3px","padding-right":"2px","vertical-align":"middle","text-decoration":"none"}}]}]}

Field.Name: Service_x0020_Type_x003a_hiddenP0
Field.Description: The program to which this service belongs, for reporting purposes.

Field.Name: Recipients_x003a_Last_x0020_Serv
Field.Description: The date when the recipient of this service last received any services (automatic). Used for automation purposes only. Do not update manually.

Field.CustomFormatter: {"$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/column-formatting.schema.json","elmType":"div","inlineEditField":"@currentField","style":{"flex-wrap":"wrap","display":"flex"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","style":{"box-sizing":"border-box","padding":"4px sp-css-color-GoldFont sp-css-color-LightGrayFont sp-css-color-LightGrayFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$Status]","Completed"]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgLightGray sp-css-borderColor-LightGrayFont sp-css-color-LightGrayFont sp-css-color-LightGrayFont","sp-field-borderAllRegular sp-field-borderAllSolid sp-css-borderColor-neutralSecondary"]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}},"children":[{"elmType":"span","style":{"overflow":"hidden","text-overflow":"ellipsis","padding":"0 3px"},"txtContent":"[$Status]","attributes":{"class":{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$Status]","Not Started"]},"sp-css-color-CornflowerBlueFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$Status]","Not Submitted"]},"sp-css-color-CornflowerBlueFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$Status]","In on Resubmission"]},"sp-css-color-MintGreenFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$Status]","Accepted on Resubmission"]},"sp-css-color-MintGreenFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$Status]","Declined on Resubmission"]},"sp-css-color-PeachFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$Status]","Withdrawn"]},"sp-css-color-LightGrayFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$Status]","Completed"]},"sp-css-color-LightGrayFont",""]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}]}}}]}]}
Field.Description: The current project or submission status.
Field.Name: Status
Field.Title: Status

Field.Description: Indicates whether this consultation, service or project is still ongoing.
Field.Name: Active

Field.Description: For grant and publication services only: the date of submission.
Field.Name: SubmissionDate
Field.Title: Submission Date

Field.Description: For grant and publication services only: the date of re-submission.
Field.Name: ResubmissionDate
Field.Title: Resubmission Date

Field.CustomFormatter: {"elmType":"div","style":{"flex-wrap":"wrap","display":"flex"},"children":[{"forEach":"__INTERNAL__ in @currentField","elmType":"div","style":{"box-sizing":"border-box","padding":"4px 8px 5px 8px","overflow":"hidden","text-overflow":"ellipsis","display":"flex","border-radius":"16px","height":"24px","align-items":"center","white-space":"nowrap","margin":"4px 4px 4px 4px"},"attributes":{"class":{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$__INTERNAL__]","Multi-Site"]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgCyan sp-css-borderColor-CyanFont sp-css-color-CyanFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$__INTERNAL__]","Large"]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgCornflowerBlue sp-css-borderColor-CornflowerBlueFont sp-css-color-CornflowerBlueFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$__INTERNAL__]","LOI"]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgPeach sp-css-borderColor-PeachFont sp-css-color-PeachFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$__INTERNAL__]","Federal Funding"]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgLightPurple sp-css-borderColor-LightPurpleFont sp-css-color-LightPurpleFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$__INTERNAL__]","Foundation Funding"]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgLilac sp-css-borderColor-LilacFont sp-css-color-LilacFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$__INTERNAL__]","Corporate Funding"]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgMintGreen sp-css-borderColor-MintGreenFont sp-css-color-MintGreenFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$__INTERNAL__]","Internal Funding"]},"sp-css-backgroundColor-BgGold sp-css-borderColor-GoldFont sp-css-color-GoldFont",{"operator":":","operands":[{"operator":"==","operands":["[$__INTERNAL__]","Internal Funding - Field.Description: For grant services only: the funding type or scope of the grant.
Field.Name: GrantFeatures
Field.Title: Grant Features

Field.Description: For grant services only: the dollar amount requested (project budget).
Field.Name: AmountRequested
Field.Title: Amount Requested

Field.Description: For grant services only: the dollar amount that was awarded, if any.
Field.Name: AmountAwarded
Field.Title: Amount Awarded

Field.Name: RatedBy
Field.Description: Users rated the item.

Field.Name: Ratings
Field.Description: User ratings for the item
The term of funding for this grant or funding opportunity, in years.
Field.Name: FundingTerm
Field.Title: Term of Funding (Months)

Field.Description: The date when the grant is received or when funding officially begins.
Field.Name: GrantStartDate
Field.Title: Grant Start Date

Field.Description: The team member with primary responsibility for this consultation.
Field.Name: Assignee

Field.Description: If this consultation was a result of an email communication, link that email tracker entry here.
Field.Name: RelatedEmail

Field.Description: The person, core, team, vendor or website that referred this person to the center. Typically this would be the first core or team that provided a service to this person.
Field.Name: ReferralSource

Field.DisplayName: Project PI or Contact:Last Service Date
Field.Name: Project_x0020_PI_x0020_or_x0020_0
